signup.title: Sign Up
signup.description: Enter your information to create an account
signup.error_user_exists: A user with that email already exists.

login.title: Login
login.description: Enter your email below to login to your account
login.error_bad_credentials: Invalid email or password. Please try again.

forgot_password.title: Forgot Password
forgot_password.description: Enter your email and we'll send you a reset link
forgot_password.success_message: We've sent a password reset link to {{email}}.
forgot_password.link_expires: The link will expire in 1 hour.

reset_password.title: Reset Password
reset_password.error_invalid_token: Invalid or missing reset token. Please contact support@mitpuzzles.com for assistance.

verification.check_inbox: Please check your inbox and verify your email.
verification.error_rate_limit: Please wait before requesting another verification email.
verification.error_failed: Failed to send verification email. Please try again.
verification.error_bad_token: Invalid verification token. Please contact support@mitpuzzles.com for assistance.
verification.error_generic: Verification failed. Please contact support@mitpuzzles.com for assistance.
verification.error_unexpected: An unexpected error occurred. Please contact support@mitpuzzles.com if this persists.
verification.success_message: Your email has been verified. You can now login. Welcome to MIT Puzzles!
verification.already_verified_message: Your email was already verified. You may now login.

username_modal.title: Choose Username
username_modal.description: Please choose a username to complete your account setup.
username_modal.display_name_hint: This is your public display name.
